steps.t: The time has come to leave Gapholt and return to Woodhurst. You will need to pass over the bridge to begin your return journey.
Westan is on the bridge leading into Gapholt. Westan saw you coming and called for your attention.
Mate Isernore is along the road between Gapholt and Woodhurst. Mate Isernore was once a mine owned by Gifemund, but was taken by the White Hand who cr…
Herubrand is in the cellar of the farmhouse in Woodhurst. You should return to Herubrand to inform him of your success in bringing aid from Gapholt an…
